title: Nexus OutlineConflictError
description: Structured detail placed inside the canonical ErrorResponse.details field when an Outline or Timeline patch is rejected because base_revision is stale (HTTP 409).

current_revision.description: Current canonical revision of the Work outline.

node_id.description: Identifier of the node or subresource involved in the conflict.

conflicting_path.description: Dot-path or locator describing the field that changed underneath the client.

recovery_hint.description: Actionable hint for the client (e.g. 'refetch and reapply').
